author: Anthony Maio
description: 11L + XSA (Exclusive Self Attention) + Partial RoPE 16/64 + Late QAT STE + Tight SWA + GPTQ-lite + LN Scale 1/sqrt(i+1) + FA3 + MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash 2048 + int5+zstd + Muon WD=0.04 + NTK-RoPE 50k + OrthoInit + sliding window eval stride=64. 5,660 steps at 101ms/step.
